holdings.infoBox: ACEP is an equity ETF with a total of 36 individual holdings. The top holdings are Lam Research stock at 7.06%, First American Government Obligations Fund Class X at 6.33%, Seagate Technology Holdings at 5.06%, Broadcom at 4.28%, and Barrick Mining at 3.73%.

overview.description: The ARS Core Equity Portfolio ETF (ACEP) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests in US-listed companies with above-average dividend yield. The ETF uses fundamental research to assess both the enterprise value and expected growth value of a company. ACEP was launched on Nov 20, 2025 and is issued by ARS.
